case_title: ROVERSO SACHIKO R VS WALGREEN DRUG STORES

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROVERSO SACHIKO R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALGREEN DRUG STORES $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $120.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
